prompt: Create a square dark anime-style music album cover featuring an original character named SELEN GRAY. Center a pale, elegant young woman with long windblown silver-gray hair partially covering one eye, cool blue eyes behind thin glasses, and a calm melancholic expression. She wears an all-black gothic streetwear outfit: high-neck top, long oversized trench coat, layered dark skirt or dress, belt details, and a small cross pendant; one hand holds black over-ear headphones by the headband at waist level. Set her on a rooftop or balcony at night with a blurred modern city skyline full of glowing windows behind her, faint clouds, atmospheric haze, and cold moonlit blue-gray lighting. Use a monochrome black, charcoal, and desaturated blue palette with subtle silver highlights, cinematic contrast, delicate linework, painterly anime rendering, and a lonely nocturnal mood. Add album-cover typography: at the top, widely spaced serif uppercase text reading SELEN GRAY with thin horizontal divider lines and a small star-like mark beneath; at the bottom, elegant handwritten script reading Midnight Silence, with a small crescent moon icon below and a thin underline. Include a worn vintage record-sleeve border with scratches, dust specks, faint film grain, scuffed corners, and slightly distressed edges, while keeping the character sharply focused and centered.
